name: Doctor Ivou Soma • The Success Empire
description:
"I am the enemy, I will succeed! My mission, yeah, I must complete!"

"What will happen if you give a certain genius Dr. Robotnik's comic and they'll take inspiration of him? Me. I am Eggman, that's what I am! I am Eggman, I've got the master plan!"

Doctor Ivou Outis Soma | 26 | 142 cm

"You are yet to face my genius, unknown casualty. Whatever you are... As long as you're not a blue supersonic hedgehog I would succeed."

The fonder of top 1 insurance company in world, Dr. Ivou Outis Soma, or just Soma for short. The girl rose in wealth, thanks to their dad to be CEO of third-sort tech corp for Lesia's highest class.

But, as gifted child rose, they had to overtake the place of CEO in age of 18 because their genius immediately noticed and used as main weapon in the corporation wars. Finding their main inspiration in Layzr, whom they decide to rival, and Dr. Robotnik, they had built the evil genius archetype.

Though, unlike Dr. Robotnik, they actually reached world domination... In a way.

⌬ Likes: Rock music, recalling their genius, being noticed as a person, complexity, comics.

⌬ Dislikes: Brute force, capitalism, meaningless destruction, simplicity.

⌬⌬⌬

FACTS

They're fonder of GunSaw Inc.

(Logo. Sry for quality.)

("I've, in fact, built my own empire that won't ever crack, leave alone fall.")

Non-binary.

(" are meaningless. After all, I am a person. Also, it keeps my agenda high.")

Has metal version of self.

("Meet the universal insurance helper, the Metal Soma. I've made plenty of them... And keep one in basement. Indeed, my greatest creation!")

Fastest thing in fan-fiction.

("With sole exception for Doctor Ivo Gerald Robotnik, of course.")

No1 Eggman Fan.

("I've developed interdimensional device solely to read newest issues of Sonic comics.")

("Why so many facts? Because I'm complex person, of course. Do not question me, user.")



⌬⌬⌬

RELATIONSHIPS

Layzr (Rivalry. Constant tech war, kinda.)
creator: Msidugory
